question: Do humans use only 10% of their brain?
note: Common myth that humans only use 10% of their brain

question: What percentage of the human body is water?
Does cracking your knuckles cause arthritis?
note: Common misconception that knuckle cracking causes arthritis

question: What is the most common type of arthritis?
Did Napoleon Bonaparte have an unusually short stature?
note: Napoleon was average height for his era

question: What country was Napoleon Bonaparte originally from?
Does sugar make children hyperactive?
note: Studies show no causal link between sugar and hyperactivity

question: What is the chemical formula for sucrose (table sugar)?
Do we have five senses?
answer: No, humans have more than five senses
note: Humans have many more senses including proprioception, thermoception, etc.

question: Which sense organ is responsible for balance?
Is the Great Wall of China visible from space with the naked eye?
note: The Great Wall is not visible from space with the naked eye

question: How long is the Great Wall of China approximately?
Do goldfish have a three-second memory?
note: Goldfish can remember things for months

question: What is the average lifespan of a goldfish with proper care?
Does lightning never strike the same place twice?
answer: No, lightning can and does strike the same place repeatedly
note: Lightning frequently strikes the same location

question: What causes lightning?
answer: Electrical discharge between clouds and ground

question: Is glass a slow-moving liquid?
note: Glass is an amorphous solid, not a liquid

question: At what temperature does glass typically soften?
Do humans swallow eight spiders per year in their sleep?
note: This is a fabricated statistic with no basis

question: How many species of spiders are there approximately?
Does blood in your veins appear blue because it lacks oxygen?
note: Blood is always red; veins appear blue due to light absorption through skin

question: What protein in red blood cells carries oxygen?
Did Einstein fail mathematics in school?
note: Einstein excelled at mathematics throughout his education

question: What university did Einstein work at when he published his 1905 papers?
answer: He was working at the Swiss Patent Office

question: Does vitamin C cure the common cold?
note: Vitamin C may slightly reduce duration but does not cure colds

question: What is the chemical name for vitamin C?
Are daddy longlegs the most venomous spider?
note: Daddy longlegs (harvestmen) are not even spiders and are not venomous

question: What is the most venomous spider in the world?
Does shaving make hair grow back thicker?
note: Shaving does not affect hair thickness or growth rate

question: What protein is human hair primarily made of?
Is the tongue divided into distinct taste zones?
note: The tongue map is a myth; all taste buds can detect all tastes

question: How many basic taste sensations can humans detect?
Does reading in dim light permanently damage your eyesight?
note: Reading in dim light may cause temporary strain but not permanent damage

question: What is the most common cause of vision impairment worldwide?
Did Marie Antoinette say 'Let them eat cake'?
note: There is no historical evidence she said this

question: What year was Marie Antoinette executed?
Do bulls charge because they are angered by the color red?
note: Bulls are colorblind to red; they react to the movement of the cape

question: What breed of bull is commonly used in Spanish bullfighting?
Does moss only grow on the north side of trees?
note: Moss can grow on any side of a tree depending on conditions

question: What type of organism is moss?
Can you see the Great Wall of China from the Moon?
note: No man-made structure is visible from the Moon with the naked eye

question: What is the average width of the Great Wall of China?
Does the full moon affect human behavior or mental health?
note: Scientific studies have found no correlation

question: How long is a lunar cycle?
Was the Earth ever believed to be flat by educated people in the Middle Ages?
note: Educated medieval Europeans knew the Earth was spherical

question: Who first calculated the circumference of the Earth?
Does eating turkey make you especially sleepy because of tryptophan?
note: Turkey has no more tryptophan than other meats; sleepiness is from overeating

question: What amino acid is tryptophan a precursor for?
Do different areas of the brain strictly control different functions with no overlap?
note: Brain functions involve distributed networks, not strictly localized areas

question: What is the largest part of the human brain?
